title: Into the Beckerverse
description: This project aims to add lots of things from the popular series Animation vs Animator and Animation vs Minecraft. Right now it only adds the Vira Band with function
body:
This mod is gonna add a lot of features from Alan Becker's 2 main series: Animation Vs Animator and Animation Vs Minecraft. Right now it adds just the Vira Band and the Vira Blade with their ability, also a new effect, though it's still work in progress. The features are currently creative only and the items are located in the vanilla tabs of Tools and Weapons.
The mod is JAVA ONLY and there will be no official port to bedrock edition. Also this project does NOT generate me revenue since I don't wanna make a profit out of Alan Becker's fantastic work.

Reason to use:

The main reason you should think of using this mod is that later in development I hope for it to be the best minecraft Animation VS Animator mod.

Backstory:

Basically, i always was searching for a high quality mod to add features from Alan, but none of them satisfied me, so I thought "wait, i already know how to mod mods through MCreator, so I'll make my own" I didn't want to keep it private so I'm uploading it on Modrinth and in the future Curseforge and 9Minecraft

DISCLAIMER: the mod is made using MCreator

You're NOT allowed to redistribute but you ARE allowed to make videos on the mod.
